decomposition_rationale: ISS-062 (seed questions, 16h) split into 3 phases to keep each phase at ~5 hours and enable parallel content work. All other 65 issues are properly scoped and kept as-is. Organized into 10 sequential batches respecting dependency order.

ISS-062.rationale: 16 hours exceeds the 4-hour practical limit for single implementation slots. Content generation can be parallelized and phased.

batches.name: Foundation
batches.description: Project structure, monorepo setup, database initialization, environment configuration. All other work depends on this batch completing successfully.

batches.name: Discovery & Decisions
batches.description: Resolve blocking open questions and define gamification constants. Blocks: Auth testing, Gamification implementation, Admin account creation.

batches.name: Authentication Layer
batches.description: Parent/child/admin auth, JWT token lifecycle, refresh rotation, password hashing, rate limiting.

batches.name: Assessment Engine
batches.description: Question bank CRUD, assessment definitions, attempt submission and scoring, subscription gating.

batches.name: Gamification Core
batches.description: XP accumulation, rank tiers, streak tracking, achievements, stats aggregation.

batches.name: Backend APIs & Security
batches.description: HTTP client with interceptor, API service layers for child/parent/admin, child management endpoints, topics/zones, attempt history, HTTPS/cookies, data privacy enforcement.

batches.name: Child Portal UI
batches.description: Child login with PIN/avatar, interactive city map, district navigation, mission runner, completion feedback, hero profile, auth state management, responsive design.

batches.name: Parent Portal UI
batches.description: Parent registration and login UI, dashboard with child management, progress tracking, subscription display.

batches.name: Admin Portal UI
batches.description: Admin login, layout framework, question/assessment management, user management, subscription overview.

batches.name: Content, Testing & QA
batches.description: Seed questions in 3 phases, unit tests for auth and gamification, integration tests, manual mobile testing.

issues.title: Set up project structure and monorepo layout
issues.description: Initialize /client and /server directories with TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier.

issues.title: Configure Express server with static asset serving and SPA fallback
issues.description: Set up Express to serve React frontend at root, API at /api/v1/*, with SPA fallback.
acceptance_criteria: SPA fallback returns index.html for non-API

issues.title: Set up SQLite database with better-sqlite3 and WAL mode
issues.description: Initialize better-sqlite3 singleton, enable WAL mode, create ./data/hero-academy.db.

issues.title: Implement database migration runner and versioning
issues.description: Create migrations/ folder with numbered SQL files, run on startup.

issues.title: Define and implement database schema
issues.description: Create tables: parents, children, subjects, topics, questions, assessments, attempts, gamification, achievements, subscriptions, refresh_token_revocations.
acceptance_criteria: All tables created with correct columns
Unique constraints on email and attempt_uuid

issues.title: Create idempotent database seed script
issues.description: Seed: 1 subject, 5 topics, 15 assessments, 150 questions, test accounts.

issues.title: Set up environment configuration and dotenv
issues.description: Create .env.example with NODE_ENV, PORT, JWT_SECRET, DATABASE_PATH.

issues.title: Set up development build process with Vite and Express
issues.description: npm run dev starts Vite dev server and Express simultaneously.
acceptance_criteria: API proxied from Vite to Express

issues.title: Implement parent registration with email verification
issues.description: POST /api/v1/auth/register-parent: validate email/password, hash, send verification email.

issues.title: Implement email verification endpoint
issues.description: POST /api/v1/auth/verify-email: verify JWT, mark parent as email_verified.

issues.title: Implement parent login with JWT issuance
issues.description: POST /api/v1/auth/login-parent: validate credentials, issue access and refresh tokens.

issues.title: Implement refresh token endpoint
issues.description: POST /api/v1/auth/refresh: verify refresh token, issue new access token, rotate refresh.
acceptance_criteria: Valid token returns new access token
Old token added to revocation list

issues.title: Implement password reset flow
issues.description: POST forgot-password and POST reset-password with secure token.

issues.title: Implement child PIN login endpoint
issues.description: POST /api/v1/auth/login-child: validate child_id and PIN, issue short-lived token.

issues.title: Implement admin login endpoint
issues.description: POST /api/v1/auth/login-admin: validate admin credentials.

issues.title: Implement JWT middleware and role-based route protection
issues.description: Create verifyToken, requireRole middleware for all protected routes.
acceptance_criteria: JWT validated on all protected routes

issues.title: Implement PIN rate-limiting
issues.description: Rate limit PIN login to 5 attempts per child per 10 minutes.

issues.title: Implement logout with token revocation
issues.description: POST /api/v1/auth/logout: add refresh token to revocation list.

issues.title: Implement question bank CRUD (admin)
issues.description: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/admin/questions with soft-delete.

issues.title: Implement assessment CRUD (admin)
issues.description: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/admin/assessments with question arrays.

issues.title: Implement topic-based assessment fetch (child)
issues.description: GET /api/v1/assessments/by-topic/:topic_id with questions (no answers).

issues.title: Implement attempt submission and scoring
issues.description: POST /api/v1/attempts: score answers, compute stars/XP, trigger gamification.

issues.title: Implement subscription gating
issues.description: Check plan from subscriptions (all free MVP), enforce gating.

issues.title: Implement XP accumulation and persistence
issues.description: Add xp_earned to child total_xp after each attempt.

issues.title: Implement rank tier evaluation
issues.description: Evaluate rank (Recruit/Sidekick/Hero/Superhero) based on XP.

issues.title: Implement streak tracking
issues.description: Track consecutive daily missions with best_streak.

issues.title: Implement achievement evaluation
issues.description: Evaluate 5 badges: First Mission, Perfect Power, Hot Streak, District Champion, Zone Master.

issues.title: Implement stats aggregation API
issues.description: GET /api/v1/gamification/stats/:child_id: return aggregated stats.

issues.title: Create child login UI
issues.description: Child list, avatar display, 4-digit PIN keypad, in-memory storage.

issues.title: Implement city map UI
issues.description: Interactive zones/districts with unlock state, Framer Motion animations.

issues.title: Create district detail and mission selection
issues.description: District showing 3 missions per topic with completion state.

issues.title: Implement mission runner
issues.description: Render questions with 4-option buttons, collect answers, display power meter.

issues.title: Implement mission completion feedback
issues.description: Display score/stars/XP with animations, show rank up and achievements.

issues.title: Create hero profile view
issues.description: Display avatar, XP bar, rank, stats, achievement badges.

issues.title: Implement auth state management
issues.description: Zustand store for JWT, child_id, auth state; auto-logout after 2h.

issues.title: Implement mobile-first responsive design
issues.description: 375px+, 44px touch, WCAG AA contrast, prefers-reduced-motion.

issues.title: Implement parent registration UI
issues.description: Registration form: email, password, strength indicator, verification.

issues.title: Create parent login UI
issues.description: Login form: email, password.

issues.title: Implement parent dashboard
issues.description: Children list, add/edit/delete child, Switch to Child View.

issues.title: Implement child progress dashboard
issues.description: Child stats: XP, rank, missions, score, streaks, achievements.

issues.title: Implement subscription display
issues.description: Display plan (Free MVP), read-only details.

issues.title: Implement admin login UI
issues.description: Admin login form: email, password.

issues.title: Implement question management
issues.description: Question list with pagination, create/edit/delete forms.

issues.title: Implement assessment management
issues.description: Assessment list with create/edit/delete and question assignment.

issues.title: Implement user management
issues.description: Parent/child lists, view details, soft-delete.

issues.title: Implement subscription overview
issues.description: Subscription stats and parent subscription list.

issues.title: Create admin portal layout
issues.description: Layout: header, sidebar, main; reusable table/form/modal components.

issues.title: Implement API client interceptor
issues.description: HTTP client with interceptor for token refresh on 401.

issues.title: Create API service for child portal
issues.description: Reusable methods: getZones, getAssessmentsByTopic, submitAttempt, getChildStats.

issues.title: Create API service for parent portal
issues.description: Reusable methods: getChildren, addChild, updateChild, deleteChild.

issues.title: Create API service for admin
issues.description: Reusable methods for CRUD on questions, assessments, users.

issues.title: Implement child management endpoints
issues.description: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/v1/parent/children.

issues.title: Implement topics and zones endpoints
issues.description: GET /api/v1/topics and GET /api/v1/zones with unlock state.

issues.title: Implement attempt history endpoints
issues.description: GET /api/v1/attempts/history and GET /api/v1/attempts/:id.

issues.title: Implement HTTPS and secure cookies
issues.description: HTTPS enforced, HttpOnly/Secure/SameSite cookies, HSTS header.

issues.title: Implement bcrypt password hashing
issues.description: All passwords bcrypted (10 rounds) before storage.

issues.title: Enforce data privacy constraints
issues.description: Child PII minimal, parent email protected, soft-delete strategy.

issues.title: Implement input validation
issues.description: Validate inputs, parameterized SQL queries.

issues.title: Implement auth rate limiting
issues.description: Rate limit login: 5/10min (parent/child), 3/hour (forgot-password).

issues.title: Resolve blocking open questions
issues.description: Resolve OQ-1 (SPA), OQ-2 (deployment), OQ-3 (email), OQ-5 (avatar), OQ-6 (ordering), OQ-8 (admin).

issues.title: Define gamification constants
issues.description: XP schedule, achievement triggers, rank thresholds.

issues.title: Write auth service unit tests
issues.description: Jest unit tests for registration, login, token (80%+ coverage).

issues.title: Write gamification unit tests
issues.description: Jest unit tests for scoring, XP, rank, streak, achievements (75%+).

issues.title: Write integration tests
issues.description: Integration tests: registration -> login -> refresh -> logout.

issues.title: Manual mobile testing
issues.description: Test child/parent on 375px device, verify responsiveness.

issues.title: Produce seed questions Phase 1 (1-50)
issues.description: Write 50 seed questions (1-50 of 150) for Mathropolis assessment suite. 11+ standard maths curriculum. Format per spec, structure for CSV import.
acceptance_criteria: All questions have 4 options with marked correct answer
Ready for CSV import to database
issues.split_note: Split from ISS-062 (16h) to enable parallel content work and keep individual tasks at ~4 hours

issues.title: Produce seed questions Phase 2 (51-100)
issues.description: Write 50 seed questions (51-100 of 150) for Mathropolis assessment suite. 11+ standard maths curriculum. Format per spec, structure for CSV import.
acceptance_criteria: All questions have 4 options with marked correct answer
Ready for CSV import to database
issues.split_note: Split from ISS-062 (16h) to enable parallel content work and keep individual tasks at ~4 hours

issues.title: Produce seed questions Phase 3 (101-150)
issues.description: Write 50 seed questions (101-150 of 150) for Mathropolis assessment suite. 11+ standard maths curriculum. Format per spec, structure for CSV import. Complete SME review and integration.
acceptance_criteria: All questions have 4 options with marked correct answer
All 150 questions integrated and seeded in database
SME review completed for entire set
issues.split_note: Split from ISS-062 (16h) to enable parallel content work and keep individual tasks at ~4 hours. Final phase includes SME review and integration.
